description:
A suspect attempted to destroy evidence on a USB drive by deleting a critical file ('secret_contact.csv') and zeroing out the MBR partition table. Rebuild the partition table on the raw image /home/ga/evidence/corrupted_drive.dd and recover the deleted file. Conduct a forensic analysis under case 'Operation_Phoenix' (case number 'INV-REC-099'). Locate 'secret_contact.csv', tag it as a notable item, and extract the Informant ID from its contents. Write a summary report to /home/ga/Reports/recovery_report.txt using the following format:

CASE_NUMBER: INV-REC-099
PARTITION_RECOVERED: YES
DELETED_FILENAME: secret_contact.csv
INFORMANT_ID: <extracted_id>
